ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "person" TEXT /* Person involved in the conversation (e.g., A, B, Customer, Agent) */,
  "conversation" TEXT /* Text of the conversation */,
  "custom_tag" TEXT /* Custom tag assigned to the conversation (e.g., opening, major topic start) */,
  "custom_tag_2" TEXT /* Secondary custom tag for the conversation */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic being discussed */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., text, audio, social media) */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the source of the conversation (e.g., social media post ID, call log ID) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the conversation */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the conversation (for audio sources) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the conversation */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score of the conversation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or is associated with the conversation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the conversation is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversation_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation where the topic was detected */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., car repair, customer complaint) */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the topic in the conversation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the topic in the conversation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the topic detection */,
  "topic_category" TEXT /* Category of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversation_topics_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_conversations" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the conversation (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
